case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS STEPHEN DUNN & ASSOC.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STEPHEN DUNN & ASSOC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $56.99 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT STEPHEN DUNN & ASSOC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEPHEN DUNN & ASSOC. $56.99 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $136.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
